_comment_: P1-9 (2026-05-13) — baseline rebaselined from empty to the 15 BE files currently containing inline-entity violations. The previous {baseline:[]} was a ratchet that quietly let regressions slip in because `pnpm lint` only walked `src/`. The accompanying eslint.config.test-discipline.mjs now runs the rule against tests/ (incl. tests/integration/) via `pnpm lint:test-discipline`. Future PRs cannot add files to this list — the rule will fire as 'error' for any non-baselined path. Fixing the 15 underlying files is a separate backlog item, NOT this commit.
_schema_: baseline = array of repo-root-relative paths whose musaium-test-discipline/no-inline-test-entities errors are grandfathered. Sorted alphabetically. Updated only by SHRINKING (Phase 7 migration to factories).
